title: The Tea Party Opens
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Big Mom, Sanji, Pudding as The wedding ceremony and tea party begin, with Big Mom’s enemies preparing to strike.
scene: The wedding begins under Big Mom’s watch, with hidden assassination plans moving beneath the ceremony.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's the matter, dog- tooth?! What happened to pudding?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the least of our worries... something crazy's afoot, mama!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What should we do?! Sanji hasn't been shot yet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Should we still stick to the plan?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sorry, mama! I had to do what they told me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I have no way to stop this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I'm gonna make you gimme back @sniji.com

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Some- thing's happening to the wedding cake!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: An believable set of... Clones?! Next issue, a poster and a color cover!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Tea Party Begins storyline with 16 dialogue beats. The wedding and tea party begin, placing Sanji, Pudding, Big Mom, Bege and the Straw Hats on a collision course.
